sources.name: Local API client
sources.detail: Submit signals from an agent workspace or local script while Lettuce runs independently.
sources.setup: Use the Lettuce client/API to submit real session summaries, decisions, and workflow signals.

sources.name: Manual paste
sources.detail: Paste any note, transcript excerpt, article, or session summary
sources.setup: Paste any raw signal below. This is the clearest first-user path.

sources.name: Markdown / GitHub
sources.detail: Repo docs, issues exported as markdown, runbooks

sources.name: Linear
sources.detail: Issues, comments, project updates, customer tags

sources.name: Email / Transcript
sources.detail: Founder inbox, support threads, call transcripts

lenses.name: Opportunity Signal
lenses.body: Find market pull, painful workflows, budget clues, and wedge shifts.

lenses.name: Relationship Signal
lenses.body: Notice named people, accounts, commitments, trust changes, and follow-up loops.

lenses.name: Project / Focus Shift
lenses.body: Detect when strategy, priority, or scope changed enough to update operating docs.

lenses.name: Durable Memory / Decision
lenses.body: Separate restart-critical truths from transient chatter.

lenses.name: Risk / Open Loop
lenses.body: Catch unresolved asks, contradictions, stale assumptions, and risky routes.

lenses.name: Next Action
lenses.body: Turn signal into one useful owner, destination, and next step.

routers.name: Customer pain → Linear + account note
routers.detail: Create/update issue, attach source quote, route to product owner.

routers.name: Strategy shift → product context
routers.detail: Patch reviewed product context and daily signal logs after human approval.

routers.name: External market signal → idea brief
routers.detail: Append evidence to product thesis and update opportunity score.

routers.name: Agent session summary → runbook
routers.detail: Propose changes to instructions, tests, or guardrails.

signals.title: Company brain control problem
signals.quote: Better organized Notion is not enough if agents are not forced/reminded/equipped to use the context.

audit.title: Workspace initialized
audit.body: Local runtime state is ready for first-user setup and real signal processing.

feedback_actions.label: Approve
feedback_actions.description: Mark the proposed routes as useful enough to apply.

feedback_actions.label: Edit
feedback_actions.description: Capture the correction that should train the lens or router.

feedback_actions.label: Decline
feedback_actions.description: Reject noisy or unsafe recommendations and record why.

organization.name: Lettuce Labs
organization.summary: Workspace for managing company signals, lenses, routing, and reviewed company-brain updates.

company_profile.summary: Lettuce turns company signal into reviewed context updates for AI agents and human operators.
company_profile.positioning: Open-core context infrastructure for AI-first teams.

people_accounts.name: Founder/operator
people_accounts.notes: Primary operator setting up and dogfooding Lettuce.

people_accounts.name: AI-first technical teams
people_accounts.notes: Teams feeling context drift across agents, docs, support, sales, and product.

projects_products.name: Standalone Lettuce runtime
projects_products.notes: Standalone app/runtime for source, lens, destination, signal review, and company-brain updates.

decisions_defaults.decision: Default to reviewed context updates before external writes.

open_loops_risks.risk: Make the first-user app mature enough for daily dogfooding, not just local proof.

agent_context_changelog.title: Seed company brain loaded
agent_context_changelog.body: Runtime starts with inspectable org and company-brain objects.

destinations.name: Company Brain
destinations.detail: Active local JSON destination for reviewed context updates and packet-backed changelog entries.

destinations.name: Linear
destinations.detail: Request issue/project route proposals once the local loop is trusted.

destinations.name: Slack
destinations.detail: Request channel/thread signal ingestion and destination routing.

destinations.name: Email
destinations.detail: Request inbox/transcript handoff routes for founder and customer signal.
